title: What's New on MedlinePlus

September 2, 2020
Genetics Home Reference has become part of MedlinePlus. 
Information from Genetics Home Reference is now available in the â Genetics â section of MedlinePlus.
The Genetics Home Reference pages included in MedlinePlus cover more than 1,300 genetic conditions and 1,475 genes, all of the human chromosomes, and mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA). Also included is a richly illustrated genetics primer, Help Me Understand Genetics, which offers basic explanations of how genes work and how mutations cause disorders, as well as current information about genetic testing, gene therapy, genetics research, and precision medicine.
August 13, 2020
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Complement Blood Test Amniocentesis (amniotic fluid test) Anoscopy Acetaminophen Level Salicylates Level Allergy Skin Test Gram Stain Bone Density Scan Respiratory Pathogens Panel Gamma-glutamyl Transferase (GGT) Test 
June 27, 2020
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Hemoglobin Electrophoresis Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD) Test MRSA Tests Prothrombin Time Test and INR (PT/INR) Synovial Fluid Analysis CCP Antibody Test
